text: - **`providers_menu.rs`** — merged list+actions Select (pick a configured provider → Edit/Test connection/Remove), "+ Add provider" filtered to unconfigured ones only, masked secrets (`sk-or-…4f2a`), dependent-role warning before removing a provider, and a "assign a role now?" bridge into Models right after adding [...] Assistant: "Test connection" works — real reachability check against your Ollama instance returned "reachable — 11 models". Let's clean up test artifacts and run the full test/clippy suite once more. [...] I ran it against your actual local Ollama instance through a real pty — it fetched and fuzzy-searched your 11 real cloud models, wrote `edge-distillation → ollama/glm-5.2:cloud` to `llms.json`, and the "Test connection" action correctly reported "reachable — 11 models." Full 389-test suite and clippy are clean.
